description_long: This object consists of three modern, box-shaped houses arranged in a stepped formation on a sloped terrain. Each house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and clean, white facades with minimal ornamentation. The houses are separated by paved walkways and retaining walls, with driveways and small landscaped areas visible. The terrain is sharply inclined, with the houses positioned at different elevations, and the base is rendered as a solid brown retaining wall. The rear of each house opens onto private patios or decks, some with wooden surfaces. The overall design emphasizes geometric simplicity and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A set of three modern, flat-roofed houses arranged on a steeply sloped terrain with white facades, large windows, and private patios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped arrangement of three houses on a sloped base, with driveways and retaining walls visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the private patios and decks behind each house, as well as the elevation difference between them.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric alignment of the houses and the sloped terrain with retaining walls.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the main entrances, driveways, and the uniform, modern facades of the three houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entryways with flat doors, minimal steps, and no decorative overhangs or columns
